name: Cathedral Fade
description: Vast reverberant hall absorbing the last sound

prompts.label: vast cathedral reverb absorbing final resonance into silence
prompts.text: vast cathedral reverb absorbing final resonance into silence, cathedral reverb at midnight, bowed singing bowl overtone, warm fog dissolving slowly, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, with natural decay

prompts.label: stone hall echo trail dissolving into sacred quiet
prompts.text: stone hall echo trail dissolving into sacred quiet, tape-saturated warmth, granular piano cloud, candlelight flickering softly, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, wide, smooth fade out

prompts.label: organ chord fading through arched ceiling space
prompts.text: organ chord fading through arched ceiling space, Brian Eno infinite space, reversed cymbal swell, underwater weightlessness, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, sustained resonance

prompts.label: candlelit nave swallowing last shimmer of sound
prompts.text: candlelit nave swallowing last shimmer of sound, abandoned hall echo, harmonium drone with tape wobble, drifting between sleep and waking, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, wide, with natural decay
